data.content:
All endpoints work correctly. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

---

**Files created/modified:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `TicketClassifier.csproj` | Added `Microsoft.ML 4.0.2` + CSV copy-to-output |
| `Models/TicketModels.cs` | Data classes: `TicketData`, `TicketPrediction`, `TicketRequest`, `TicketResponse`, `EvaluationMetrics` |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML.NET pipeline — text featurization of Subject/Description, concatenated with Priority, trained with SDCA Maximum Entropy |
| `Controllers/TicketController.cs` | Two endpoints: `POST /api/ticket/classify` and `GET /api/ticket/metrics` |
| `Program.cs` | Registers the classifier as a singleton |

**Endpoints:**

- **`POST /api/ticket/classify`** — accepts `{subject, description, priority}`, returns predicted category + per-class probabilities
- **`GET /api/ticket/metrics`** — returns model evaluation metrics (macro/micro accuracy, log-loss)

**Test results:**

| Input | Predicted | Confidence |
|---|---|---|
| "Charged twice" / billing description | **Billing** | 73.8% |
| "App crash" / null reference | **Technical** | 39.1% |
| "Question" / feature inquiry | **General** | 99.5% |
| Empty subject (validation) | **400 Bad Request** | — |

**Metrics:** 100% macro/micro accuracy on training data, log-loss 0.0002. The small dataset (6 rows) means perfect training-set accuracy is expected — add more training data for production use.
